===Pokémon===
Milo keeps his Pokémon in [[Ultra Ball]]s.

====Gym battle====
Milo will [[Dynamax]] his {{p|Eldegoss}} at the first opportunity.

{{Party

====Max Raid Battle partner====
Milo teams up with the player, [[Hop]], and [[Piers]] to face a [[Dynamax]] {{p|Tsareena}} in a [[Max Raid Battle]].
